name: ibl-agent-workflow
description: IBL cross-agent workflow skills for session handoff, continuity, and agentic orchestration.

interface.shortDescription: Session handoff and orchestration skills for IBL agents.
interface.longDescription: IBL Agent Workflow packages reusable, host-agnostic skills for moving work between agent sessions and coordinating multi-agent execution.
defaultPrompt: Write a handoff document so a fresh agent can continue this work.
Summarise this session and save a handoff document.
Plan an agentic orchestration strategy for this work.
